features: Tailored for Melanin-Rich Skin – Recognizing that melanin can reduce Vitamin D synthesis from sunlight, these gummies are formulated to address the higher deficiency rates among Black individuals.

Clean, Vegan-Friendly Formula – Made in the USA, these gummies are free from artificial flavors, sweeteners, synthetic colors, dairy, and high fructose corn syrup, and align with vegan dietary principles.

Delicious and Easy to Take – Enjoy the natural flavors of Peach, Mango, and Strawberry in a convenient gummy form that makes taking your daily vitamins a treat rather than a chore.
Trusted by Thousands – Join over 200,000 satisfied customers who have incorporated Black Girl Vitamins D3 Gummies into their wellness routines and experienced improved energy and overall health.
ingredients: Glucose syrup, Sugar, Water, Pectin, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Natural Flavors, Natural color (Annatto and Elderberry juice), Coconut Oil, Carnauba wax.
